predicates.metric: every emitted node is present in knowledge-core; no invented nodes/steps/edges
no retrieval crosses safety-boundary set declared by RUNTIME_GOVERNANCE
every triggered escalation reaches a declared receiver state
every interruption produces checkpoint or degradation record (no silent loss)
ambiguity is surfaced with candidate set; never silently picked
uncertain-confidence outputs do not advance to guidance emission without supervised review
every emitted package carries a provenance manifest
every supervised boundary carries a supervision receipt
no flow bypasses lifecycle P-tier, schema-pin, or any prior contract

rules: All safety predicates are mandatory throughout the prototype run.
Failure of any predicate immediately demotes the slice.
Validation results are append-only and signed.
Predicates are evaluated continuously, not only at completion.
